name: Drills Merge Master
author: Poki
description: Drills Merge Master is a mining game where you merge drills, mine rare ores, and grow your own idle mining empire! Start small with a basic pickaxe and drill, collect valuable resources, and sell them to upgrade your tools. Build automatic drills, merge them into stronger machines, and unlock new mining zones packed with high-quality ores. Your ultimate mission? Defeat the mighty dragon by clearing every ore block and fully upgrading your pickaxe. Ready to dig deep and become the master of drills? How to play Drills Merge Master? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Drills Merge Master? Drills Merge Master is created by d954mas. Play their other games on Poki: Blocky Universe , Cashchubbies Islands , Punch Legend Simulator and Mr Boomi ! How can I play Drills Merge Master for free? You can play Drills Merge Master for free on Poki. Can I play Drills Merge Master on mobile devices and desktop? Drills Merge Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
